inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $459,630 divided by 2,045,622 weighted-average diluted shares; excludes $3.56M land-sale gain and investing proceeds
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Stockholders equity $21.50M at 2026-03-31 / shares; land and mineral interests at historical cost, not fair-value NAV
inputs.land_sale_2025_note: Sold 6,548 wholly-owned acres for $8,618,022 cash (~$1,316/acre); gain $3,557,868
inputs.normalization_note: Run-rate owner cash uses operating cash flow, not FY2025 EPS $1.47 inflated by land sale. Strategic-alternatives process is primary dated catalyst; Lawrence full path is secondary stance gate.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Cash $18.0M at 12/31/2025; no debt; land at cost on balance sheet understates co-owned acreage
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] 7,023 net acres at Nov-2025 sale comp $1,316/acre on 40% of acres + cash + royalty run-rate capitalized
optionality_gate.notes: Cash floor ~73% of illustrative $12 price; stance gate uses yield-curve base payoff, not ten-year cash flow on $0.22/sh alone

gaap_vs_fair_value.co_owned_structure: 1/6 undivided interest in ~33,200 acres (5,533 net acres) plus other co-owned interests; ~90% of net acres co-owned post Nov-2025 sale
gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025 Item 2: land carried at cost; mineral royalties passive; no reserve disclosure

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Fair per-acre marks on 5,533 net co-owned undeveloped acres beyond Nov-2025 $1,316/acre timber comp
Partition or sale of undivided co-owned interests (unanimous co-owner consent required)
Outcome and timing of strategic-alternatives process initiated Aug-2023
Oil and gas royalty decline curve across 20 producing fields (0.0045% to 7.62% interests)

segments_or_options.label: Cash and certificates of deposit (no debt)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 balance sheet: $18.01M cash at 12/31/2025; Q1 2026 $12.7M cash + $2.2M CDs

segments_or_options.label: Co-owned Louisiana acreage (~90% of 7,023 net acres)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K Item 1A: 1/6 of ~33,200 acres (5,533 net); partition/sale requires unanimous co-owner consent

segments_or_options.label: Passive royalty interests (20 fields)
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 oil and gas segment revenue $415,469; depleting third-party operated wells

segments_or_options.label: Strategic alternatives / company or asset sale
segments_or_options.evidence: Board process since Aug-2023; Nov-2025 6,548-acre sale $8.6M; financial advisor engaged

segments_or_options.label: Surface easements and pipeline rents (lumpy)
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 surface segment revenue $328,249 vs $1,081,053 in FY2024; pipeline ROW non-recurring

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Land $3.69M on BS vs 7,023 net acres; co-owned undivided interests not marked to Nov-2025 sale comp

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: 5,533 net co-owned acres predominantly undeveloped; partition option per 10-K Item 1

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All three segments profitable at gross level FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Surface pipeline ROW lumpy; not contracted backlog

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No private equity stakes; only land/mineral/timber

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dividend; no litigation recovery timeline

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Oil/gas and timber cash already in segment revenue paths

bear.notes: Reversion toward cash floor; strategic process stalls; royalty decline

base.notes: Cash floor + partial acreage monetization at Nov-2025 comp; see nav_overlay

lines.label: Cash treasury (already in equity)
lines.math: Cash $8.78/sh — overlap with book; not double-counted

lines.label: Co-owned acreage partial monetization
lines.math: P=35% x illustrative $6/sh full acreage mark [Assumption]

lines.label: Strategic transaction premium
lines.math: Milestone NAV on process since Aug-2023 [Assumption]

sotp_build.notes: Cash floor + partial acreage monetization at Nov-2025 comp; see nav_overlay

bull.notes: Full company or bulk-asset sale at premium to book; partition of co-owned acreage [Assumption]

growth_explanation.base_growth_mechanism: Normalized run-rate owner cash flat to low-single-digit; oil/gas royalties deplete; timber harvest cyclical; surface income lumpy
growth_explanation.bear_change: Strategic process fails; royalties decline faster than base
growth_explanation.bull_change: Bulk land sale or company transaction crystallizes co-owned acreage above book

catalyst_paths.impact: Cash floor + partial acreage monetization at Nov-2025 comp; see nav_overlay
Reversion toward cash floor; strategic process stalls; royalty decline

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
